claim.content: For the ideal (strictly two-dimensional, zero-width, disorder-free) paramagnetic two-dimensional homogeneous electron gas, the extrapolated thermodynamic-limit quasiparticle effective mass remains close to unity across the studied density parameters r_s=1, 5, and 10, and the high-precision DMC extrapolations reported here show no evidence for a strong enhancement of m^* at low density in this ideal system.
